    Announcement

    • Are you active in the fields of drug design, bioiformatics, biotechnology, computational life science or related fields and are interested in getting visibility in a prestigious international conference ?
    • Are you interested in contributing to the exposure of the Romanian scientific community to a prestigious international community ?
    • Are you interested in supporting PhD students in their scientific endaviours by awarding a poster prize ?
    • Are you interested in supporting your students in getting exposure to a prestigious international community ?
    • Are you interested in contrbuting directly to the ISQBP awards and thereby linking your company with one of the most appreciated leaders in these fields ?

    Then join us in supporting the orgnization of this prestigious international event

    We can offer:

    • Continuous presentation of your logo/name/activity during the conference
    • Highlighting your activity by session chair persons in short introductory presentation with a slide
    • Space for your mobile poster boards
    • Presentation booth
    • Visibility and summary of your participation on our website

    All theses in a personalized sponsorship agreement

    If interested, please contact directly the ISQBP President, Dr. Vlad Cojocaru (vlad.cojocaru[at]ubbcluj.ro)
